name: Bacon-Wrapped Turkey Burgers
recipeInstructions:
Set oven to broil and/or 550 degrees. Cook until the mixture is limp; cool.
Mix together turkey, bread crumbs, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic salt. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Shape into six patties, each about 6 inches thick.
Crisscross two slices of bacon on each patty, tucking the ends under. Secure with wooden picks.
Broil with the tops about 4 inches from the heat until the turkey springs back when touched and is no longer pink, approximately 4 minutes per side.
